Know About Us

Ancient Wisdom For Modern Life

Welcome to AstroVedic, your trusted destination for authentic Vedic astrology services. With over 25 years of experience, our certified astrologers have guided thousands of individuals through life's most important decisions.

We combine ancient Vedic wisdom with modern understanding to provide you with accurate, meaningful, and actionable astrological insights that truly help you navigate your life journey.

  • Expert Vedic Astrologers with 20+ Years Experience
  • Personalized Birth Chart Analysis
  • Accurate Predictions & Life Guidance
  • Confidential & Trusted Consultations

Call Our Expert

+(91) 1800-124-105
Read More
What We Offer

Our Astrology Services

From Vedic horoscopes to Tarot readings, we offer a comprehensive range of astrology services to guide you through every aspect of life.

🏠

Vastu Shastra

Harmonize your living and working spaces with ancient Vastu principles for prosperity and peace.

Learn More
📖

Birth Journal

Detailed analysis of your birth chart revealing your life path, personality, and future prospects.

Learn More
💍

Manglik Dosha

Expert analysis and remedies for Mangal Dosha for a blissful and harmonious married life.

Learn More
📚

Lal Kitab

Ancient Lal Kitab astrology predictions and powerful remedies for your problems.

Learn More
🔮

Crystal Ball

Scrying and crystal ball readings for future insights and spiritual guidance.

Learn More
⭐

Kundli Dosh

Identification and effective remedies for all types of Doshas in your Kundli.

Learn More
🃏

Tarot Reading

Accurate tarot card readings for love, career, and life decisions with deep insights.

Learn More
✋

Palm Reading

Palmistry analysis to understand your character, talents, and potential future events.

Learn More
View All Services

Why Choose Us

The Most Trusted Astrology Platform

With decades of experience and thousands of satisfied clients, AstroVedic has established itself as the most reliable and accurate astrology platform in the industry.

Certified Astrologers

All our astrologers are certified with advanced degrees in Vedic astrology and have been vetted for accuracy.

Authentic Vedic Methods

We follow traditional Vedic astrology methods passed down through generations for accurate readings.

24/7 Availability

Get guidance whenever you need it. Our astrologers are available round the clock for consultations.

100% Confidential

Your personal information and consultation details are kept completely private and secure.

Our Pricing

Choose Your Plan

Transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Choose the plan that best fits your spiritual journey.

🌙

Perfect for beginners exploring astrology

$29/month
  • Daily Horoscope
  • Weekly Forecast
  • Basic Birth Chart
  • Email Support
  • 1 Consultation/month

    Kundli Analysis
  • ✕
    Gemstone Advice

Premium

Most popular for serious seekers

$79/month

  • Gemstone Advice
  • 3 Consultations/month
  • Priority Email Support
  • Yearly Forecast

    Priority Support

Complete astrology experience

$149/month

  • 24/7 Priority Support
  • Personalized Yearly Report

Mercury Retrograde 2026: What It Means For Each Zodiac Sign

Mercury retrograde is one of the most talked-about astrological events. Discover how this powerful transit affects your zodiac sign and how to navigate it wisely.

The Power of Numerology: How Numbers Shape Your Destiny
